positive: A stylized, high-contrast geometric portrait of a graceful female profile adorned with celestial and organic elements. The composition should be central and symmetrical, featuring interwoven motifs of crescent moons, shooting stars, stylized ferns, and abstract geometric mandalas. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, iridescent gold, sage green, and crisp cream. The style should blend Art Deco symmetry with fine line etching and cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and intricate linework, suitable for a repeat pattern or a large central print on apparel. Studio quality, vector art feel, dramatic backlighting, highly detailed.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, dirty, messy, extra limbs, cropped, copyright, logo, celebrity, cartoon, photorealism
